metadata.title: Sofia & Mateus — We're getting married
metadata.description: Join us to celebrate the wedding of Sofia and Mateus.

story.title: Our Story
story.body: From a chance meeting to a lifetime together — we can't wait to celebrate this next chapter surrounded by the people we love.

rsvp.title: Will you join us?
rsvp.subtitle: Please let us know by November 1, 2026.

footer.madeWith: Made with love for Sofia & Mateus
